required_skills: Growth strategy development and full-funnel ownership across acquisition, activation, retention, and revenue
Paid media management and performance marketing optimization across search and social channels
Search Engine Optimization (SEO) and organic channel strategy
Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) and A/B testing program management
Product analytics, cohort analysis, and funnel instrumentation
Growth modeling, forecasting, and bottoms-up channel planning
SQL for self-serve funnel analysis, retention reporting, and cohort segmentation
Team leadership and cross-functional stakeholder management across product, data, and marketing
Budget ownership and performance marketing ROI management
Experimentation design and statistical significance evaluation
preferred_skills: Experience scaling a growth function from early-stage to Series B or beyond
Familiarity with product-led growth (PLG) motions and in-product virality mechanics
Knowledge of account-based marketing (ABM) and B2B demand generation strategies
Exposure to international or multi-market growth expansion playbooks
Understanding of data infrastructure — event tracking schemas, CDP architecture, and attribution modeling
Experience managing and mentoring junior growth analysts or associates
Familiarity with influencer, affiliate, or partnership-driven growth channels
responsibilities: Own the end-to-end growth strategy across all acquisition and retention channels, setting quarterly targets and managing execution against CAC, LTV, and MoM growth goals
Lead and scale paid acquisition programs across Google Ads and Meta, managing six-figure monthly budgets and optimizing toward blended CAC and ROAS targets
Build and manage a structured experimentation roadmap, running A/B and multivariate tests across landing pages, onboarding flows, and lifecycle touchpoints
Partner with product and engineering teams to design and implement in-product growth loops, referral programs, and activation optimizations
Develop bottoms-up growth models and channel-level forecasts to project user and revenue trajectories across multiple planning scenarios
Instrument and maintain the full marketing analytics stack — owning event taxonomy, attribution logic, and funnel reporting across Segment and downstream BI tools
Lead SEO strategy including content planning, technical audits, and link-building programs that compound organic traffic growth quarter over quarter
Manage lifecycle marketing programs in Braze or HubSpot, designing segmented journeys that improve activation rates and reduce early-stage churn
Present growth performance reviews to the leadership team weekly, translating data into strategic insights and course corrections
Hire, mentor, and develop a team of growth analysts and associates, building a high-velocity experimentation culture within the function
